code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_ws = false
  if i == n
    is_ws = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(evens)
            evens = "#{v}"
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
          end
        else
          if string.is_empty(odds)
            odds = "#{v}"
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
